monster.name: FrankiePartenope
monster.description: A former adventurer with an imposing physique, Frankie is a people's hero — a sort of local Robin Hood. He carries himself proudly despite the scars and marks of imprisonment in Orcastle. He speaks in a direct tone, no frills, and has a visceral hatred for Lord Malebranche that seeps from every word. Distinctive trait: he still bears the marks of the explosive collar on his neck — a band of reddened skin he touches constantly, as if to remind himself he's no longer a prisoner. Role: allied NPC of the party
